calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields #7235.

Stanley Michael, Esq. appeared for plaintiff California State Automobile Assoc.
Filed copy of a declaration in lieu of testimony was presented in open court.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Francisco Toca, Ind. and dba Toca Park as follows:

Damages/Principal - $4,570.57
Costs - $275.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,845.57

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Continued To Oct-21-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
